title: Invited to London
description: Module Two — Daily life and describing: telling a trip in the simple past (regular and irregular verbs, negatives, questions), the past continuous for actions in progress (was/were + verb-ing) with when and while, describing people (physical and personality adjectives) and places, and comparing two things with the comparative (-er than, more … than, irregular better/worse)
sources: Let's Discover More English — 8th Year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541805) — Module 2
Scope reconstruit de sources web scolaires tunisiennes — À REVALIDER sur le guide CNP officiel 541805
